---
name: Data Update
about: Report incorrect or missing nursery data (mobile numbers, GPS, inventory)
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data-update
assignees: ''

## What data needs updating?

<!-- Example: "Nursery #45 (মোঃ আব্দুল করিম) has the wrong mobile number." -->

## Nursery Identifier

- **Registry serial:** [e.g., 45, or "N/A" if it's an inventory-only nursery]
- **Owner name:** [Bengali or transliterated]
- **Upazila:** [e.g., উলিপুর]
- **Current address:** [as shown in the app]

## What's wrong?

<!-- Describe what is incorrect or missing. -->

- [ ] Wrong mobile number
- [ ] Missing mobile number
- [ ] Wrong GPS coordinates
- [ ] Missing GPS coordinates
- [ ] Wrong inventory counts
- [ ] Wrong owner name
- [ ] Wrong upazila
- [ ] Other (please describe below)

## Correct information

<!-- Provide the correct values. Be as specific as possible. -->

```
Mobile:
Latitude:
Longitude:
Other notes:
```

## Source of correction

<!-- How do you know the correct value?
- Field visit
- Phone call with owner
- Official DAE record
- Other (please specify)
-->

## Supporting documents

<!-- Attach photos of field forms, screenshots of SMS, or any other evidence. -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I have verified this correction with the nursery owner or an authoritative source.
- [ ] I understand this update will be reflected in the public registry.
